title: Anime Bed Overlays v2
body:
Itsme64's Anime Bed Overlays V2 is a recreation of a pack I made more than four years ago!

This new pack contains 16 unique anime bed overlays for each color bed in Minecraft, and modifies the bed items to also have the same overlays on them.\
All "anime" sprites in this pack are created and owned by me! (completely OC)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9jFC8Dg3kHI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

[Check out my YouTube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@Itsme64/)

For any questions/comments/concerns leave a comment or contact me via [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/f2TH4TQ3J5).
